section_name: Defense: Financial Responsibility in Effect at Time of Alleged Offense
text:
(a) It is a defense to prosecution under Section 601.191 (Operation of Motor Vehicle in Violation of Motor Vehicle Liability Insurance Requirement; Offense) or 601.195 (Operation of Motor Vehicle in Violation of Requirement to Establish Financial Responsibility; Offense) that the person charged produces to the court one of the documents listed in Section 601.053 (Evidence of Financial Responsibility) (a) that was valid at the time that the offense is alleged to have occurred.

(b) After the court verifies a document produced under Subsection (a), the court shall dismiss the charge.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 601. Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act
##### § 601.193 — Defense: Financial Responsibility in Effect at Time of Alleged Offense

(a) It is a defense to prosecution under Section 601.191 (Operation of Motor Vehicle in Violation of Motor Vehicle Liability Insurance Requirement; Offense) or 601.195 (Operation of Motor Vehicle in Violation of Requirement to Establish Financial Responsibility; Offense) that the person charged produces to the court one of the documents listed in Section 601.053 (Evidence of Financial Responsibility) (a) that was valid at the time that the offense is alleged to have occurred.

(b) After the court verifies a document produced under Subsection (a), the court shall dismiss the charge.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995. Amended by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 844, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1997; Acts 1999, 76th Leg., ch. 961, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1999.*

subsections.label: a

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: After the court verifies a document produced under Subsection (a), the court shall dismiss the charge.
